texto: Do you remember his science project, Harry Sue, on the trajectory of spitballs? I tell you, that modest little display taught our students more about physics than I could accomplish in a weeklong unit at the middle school
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Sue Stauffacher que provoca temas ligados a educacao. Ao questionar “Do you remember his science project, Harry Sue, on the trajectory of spitballs? I tell you, that …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre educacao, humor, science, com foco em science.
